introSection: Movie Park Studio Tour is a steel launched enclosed dark ride roller coaster currently located at Movie Park Germany. The ride replaced the Ice Age Adventure dark ride, reusing its showbuilding.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
This ride was first teased in March 2020, being touted as the "biggest birthday present ever" in a cryptic series of videos.

This led up to the ride being revealed as an Intamin Multi Dimensional Coaster in August 2020.

Assembly of the track was completed in late January 2021.

Movie Park Studio Tour opened to the public on 23 June 2021.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride features two launches, dark ride elements, and a turntable. Instead of being themed around a specific IP like many of the other rides at Movie Park Germany, the ride is themed more generally to film-making.

fullText:
Movie Park Studio Tour is a steel launched enclosed dark ride roller coaster currently located at Movie Park Germany. The ride replaced the Ice Age Adventure dark ride, reusing its showbuilding.

This ride was first teased in March 2020, being touted as the "biggest birthday present ever" in a cryptic series of videos.

This led up to the ride being revealed as an Intamin Multi Dimensional Coaster in August 2020.

Assembly of the track was completed in late January 2021.

Movie Park Studio Tour opened to the public on 23 June 2021.

The ride features two launches, dark ride elements, and a turntable. Instead of being themed around a specific IP like many of the other rides at Movie Park Germany, the ride is themed more generally to film-making.

Black track and supports.
